questionHtml: Using an international trade diagram, explain the likely impact of the removal of import quotas on North Macedonia’s production of wine (Text C).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [3].

The use of P and Q on the axes is sufficient for an international trade diagram. The world price line may be labelled as S(World), SW, S(EU), Pworld, PW, PEU or any similar label indicating the horizontal line is the world (EU) price/supply. A title is not necessary.

meta.title: Using an international trade diagram, explain the likely impact of the removal of import quotas on North Macedonia’s production of wine (Text C).
